meaning: n.赛亚裙(菲律宾、西班牙和西班牙语国家穿的一种齐膝短裙)
examples: The scary thing about Saya is her virtual past.
Combination photo shows Saya making facial expressions.
Kudan primary school children touch the cheek of Japan's robot teacher Saya.
Sebagai penutup, saya mengucapkan kepada seluruh rakyat Indonesia: terima kasih atas.
Veiled women in Philippine baro blouses and saya long dresses pray at each bag, extinguishing the candle before moving on to the next piece of luggage - the dilapidated remains of Filipino travelers.
